author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: All Step 1 core types implemented and tested. 8/8 tests passing. Files: device.rs (Device enum), dtype.rs (Float trait + re-exports), error.rs (FerrotorchError), storage.rs (TensorStorage + StorageBuffer), tensor.rs (Tensor + GradFn trait + TensorId), lib.rs (re-exports). Workspace Cargo.toml with ferray path deps (bf16 feature enabled). 2 dead_code warnings for pub(crate) functions awaiting Step 3+4 consumers.
